# Generated by Capy — RISC-V 64 (RV64I) Linux.
# Build:  riscv64-linux-gnu-gcc -nostdlib -static hello.s -o hello
.data
hello:
    .ascii "Hello, world\n"

.text
.global _start
_start:
li a7, 64                 # syscall: write
li a0, 1          # arg0: fd
la a1, hello         # arg1: buffer
li a2, 13         # arg2: count
ecall
li a7, 93                 # syscall: exit
li a0, 0        # arg0: status code
ecall
